summary.text: Customers find the cellular phone arrives in great condition and good as new. They describe it as a good phone with impeccable quality. The phone's appearance receives positive feedback from users. However, customers have mixed opinions on battery life, screen protection, reliability, camera performance, and screen quality, with some customers disagreeing on these aspects.

authors_reviews.title: Nice buy!
authors_reviews.text: This is amazing! I bought it for my brother, looks brand new to me, just a very little scrape on at the back but overall, functioning and looks near. It also comes with a charger and the sim tool, and was packaged in a fair packaging. Battery health is 87% but it’s okay, as long as it’s 80 and above. 😇 I didn’t remove the screen and case protector to check if there were hidden scratches but i used flashlight and it seems fair to me so I’m all good. Hopefully it lives long!
authors_reviews.author: Racha Soliman

authors_reviews.title: Quality
authors_reviews.text: Good quality feel like new.No any problem observed so far.
authors_reviews.author: Sajanpreet singh

authors_reviews.title: Amazing phone
authors_reviews.text: I’ve had my iPhone 13 Pro for over 8 months now and it’s been absolutely flawless. The 120Hz ProMotion display is insanely smooth and still feels premium every time I use it. Performance is fast, battery life is solid, and I haven’t had a single issue since day one. Cameras are great, build quality is top-tier, and it just works.Honestly, it feels like the only iPhone I’ll ever need. Reliable, smooth, and still holds up like new. I’ve actually tried a friends iPhone 17 pro and it’s only slightly better. I think the iPhone 13 Pro is such a good in between. Having an amazing display while having that fractional cost.
authors_reviews.author: zenas

authors_reviews.title: Don’t buy from Gadget Deals
authors_reviews.text: I bought an iPhone 13 Pro and have been using it for less than 5 months. It was working well initially and then yesterday morning when I woke up it said that 0 percent battery was remaining on the screen and it looked like it was charging and at 1%. The phone also started to reboot after 2-3 minutes continuously. We took the phone to Apple. They said it was very likely due to improper battery replacement when it was renewed. They said it was an issue with a special chip that is attached to the battery which had likely not been put back in the phone properly and disconnected from the battery making the OS believe there was an issue with the battery.I spoke to Amazon and they weren’t able to help as it was past their 90 day window. I then was given the number for Gadget Deals who said that because it was out of the 90 day window they would not help me. This is really terrible! When you purchase a phone for $$$$ and they refuse to help with an issue that is clearly theirs, it just isn’t appropriate. I will never buy anything from Gadget Deals again and I would suggest you don’t unless you want to be stuck with a very expensive paper weight.
authors_reviews.author: GF

authors_reviews.title: Great Deal, But Don’t Skip Apple Diagnostics!
authors_reviews.text: !!When buying a refurbished phone on Amazon please use apple diagnostic on ur Mac to check if the phone you got is working every single function before you use it!!!tbh is a good deal for a refurbished phone, I was lowkey scared when it was coming cause I thought I might be scammed. When it came the general condition was like new. Which they was minor tiny scratch on the side of the camera lens, not directly!this is good for someone who wants a cheaper phone and get the deal for a good phone! Although you might not get AppleCare it’s a great alternative. My battery health came in with 83% it might seem less but just keep charging in between 30%-90% and 40%-80% so you don’t drain your battery health. Another thing I like it’s that I can change the battery of the phone from Apple Store ~130CAD still cheap and still be brand new! FR I recommend this!
authors_reviews.author: ekn

authors_reviews.title: Kitcener
authors_reviews.text: Excellent product but unfortunately no longer needed
authors_reviews.author: Abdalrzak Alahmad

authors_reviews.title: Not a good first impression
authors_reviews.text: I'm not sure what "excellent" means when it comes to refurbished iPhones but it falls short of my expectations.I received this yesterday and so far the issues are cosmetic, mainly with the bezel. There are noticeable dents, cuts and gouges all along the bezel. I've only seen this type of damage on phones with replaced screens due to the tech going ham scraping and prying up the old shattered screen. It was during this process that they undoubtedly skewed the top speaker as well; it no longer sits straight and flush against the bezel or screen cutout. This shows very little care on the tech's part to be sure.There are also some slight pitting and scratches along the sides, however this is something I would expect from a refurbished product in "excellent" condition. Still, with the obvious damage done during its renewal, this is not a good first impression. We'll see if the battery lasts. Will update in a couple of weeks. Cheers!
authors_reviews.author: LRod

authors_reviews.title: Working great so far
authors_reviews.text: Works great, no scratches or external flaws. Came with 90% battery capacity. Very satisfied!
authors_reviews.author: Katie
